title: Better Chorus Trees
description: Improvements to Chorus trees that can impact farms and end agriculture :D
body:
_After many user requests, I am beginning to slowly migrate my past projects over to Modrinth from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/derexxd/projects?page=1&sortBy=TotalDownloads) where they've lived for years. This was one of my first mods I coded in high school for college apps!_

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884299c917ef9ee0a743298578a1ed62f6e24e77_0.webp)

## Description

In vanilla Minecraft, **chorus flowers** don't break when their stem is destroyed, and you have to manually break them or shoot them with an arrow to harvest them. This datapack changes that.

**Better Chorus Flower Drops** makes chorus flowers behave more intuitively similar to bamboo or sugarcane so that when the stem is broken, the flower drops naturally.

This change applies to both:
- Naturally generated chorus trees
- Player-grown chorus plants

## Installation

1. Download the datapack `.zip` file.
2. Place it in the `datapacks` folder of your world 
3. Run `/reload` in-game or reopen the world.
4. You're done!


## ❤️ Credits:  
This was originally created during COVID for the original derex smp. It was since then been repurposed and installed on our forever world, also named derex smp, 5 years later. 

Developed by Derex... or derex_, derec4, derexXD, dereXD, derexwq, DereC_, CORRUPT_Greninja, lordnexus123, or whatever iteration of my username we are on at this point.
